title: Assistant Store Manager - MTR Foods Capital India - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - MTR Foods Capital India - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with MTR Foods Capital India! We are hiring a Assistant Store Manager for our Lucknow team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About MTR Foods Capital India:
MTR Foods Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in POS Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MTR Foods Capital India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
